Author: Serpens66
Name: Improved Hunters
Description: Adds configurable hunter prey and meat yield for deer, goats, rabbits, camels, chickens and cows.

Changes: Remove obsolete hunter building availability workaround code.
Remove temporary diagnostic logs for animal detection, hunter target queries and scan summaries.
Keep only the active Improved Hunters runtime behavior and essential warning logs.
Remove the temporary non-hunter chicken projectile and target-state workaround because it could leave ranged units stuck in shooting animations.
Disable cow hunting in runtime logic while keeping the cow settings visible for later experiments.
Restore cow arrow damage to the original value if a previous runtime patch had changed it.
Clear automatic non-hunter ranged targets against chickens while chicken hunting is enabled.
Allow explicit AttackUnit orders against chickens for a short time so manual attacks remain possible.
Add diagnostics for cleared chicken auto-targets.
Convert player-owned chickens to nature-owned chickens while chicken hunting is enabled.
Use OnUnitCreate to make newly spawned chickens nature-owned before the original spawn runs.
Remove the temporary delayed test animal/unit spawn diagnostics.
Trigger the delayed test animal/unit spawn from the native scan loop instead of the Script Extender timer engine.
Use the StartConditions-style single spawn tile per keep for the delayed chicken/deer spawn test.
Spawn one player-owned arab slinger at the same test position to verify unit spawning.
Force hunter building availability again immediately after spawning the test deer.
Also spawn one owner=0 test deer near every keep together with the delayed owner=0 test chickens.
Spawn ten owner=0 test chickens near every keep five seconds after map start while chicken hunting is enabled.
Add logs for the owner=0 chicken spawn test to diagnose whether chicken ownership blocks hunter targeting.
Accept hunter target queries for valid prey even when the Script Extender reports an invalid hunter id.
Add more detailed invalid hunter target query diagnostics.
Repeat the delayed hunter building availability refresh several times after map start.
Add cows as an optional hunter prey type, disabled by default with a default meat yield of 6.
Add cow detection, scan and hunter target query diagnostics.
Increase arrow damage against cows while cow hunting is enabled for reliable hunter kills.
Add detailed hunter building availability diagnostics and force a build screen refresh when enabled prey exists.
Add hunter scan, requery and invalid target query diagnostics for chicken hunting.
Mark collected short-lived prey corpses for deletion immediately after pickup.
Allow chickens with player ownership flags to become eligible hunter targets.
Delay and retry the hunter building availability workaround after map start.
Increase arrow damage against animal camels while camel hunting is enabled for more reliable hunter kills.
Only re-enable the hunter building on map start when at least one enabled Improved Hunters prey animal exists on the loaded map.
Add diagnostic logs for chicken detection and hunter target queries.
Re-enable the hunter building on map start when the mod has extra prey enabled.
Extend corpse despawn time for camels and chickens while their hunting options are enabled.
Allow chickens to be selected as hunter targets without changing chicken ownership.
Renamed Hunt Rabbits to Improved Hunters.
Added lobby settings to enable or disable the mod, configure huntable animal types and set meat yield per animal.
Added support for deer, goats, rabbits, camels and player-owned granary chickens.
Preserve the hunter's mandatory initial walk to the hunter post before allowing rabbit searches.
Remove rabbit corpses immediately after a hunter collects them.
Prefer nearby rabbits by removing the base game's minimum target distance for rabbits only.
Let idle wandering hunters immediately repeat the native target search when an unreserved rabbit is within the normal hunting radius.
Keep slain rabbits for about one minute (1800 game ticks) so hunters can reach and collect them.
Trace hunter AI state and target assignment after rabbits are accepted by the target hook.
Keep the runtime, event subscriptions and rabbit despawn patch active when the BepInEx manager is destroyed after bootstrap.
Run diagnostics through map, unit and coroutine triggers and log the complete plugin lifecycle.
Add direct native unit polling and machine-code verification for diagnostics.
Add targeted diagnostics for rabbit eligibility and hunter target queries.
Allow hunters to select rabbits as hunting targets.
Keep slain rabbits on the map long enough for hunters to collect them.
